title: Silky Paleo Chicken Supreme
description: A sweet and silky Vietnamese dish featuring roasted chicken in a paleo-friendly blend of coconut milk and sugar syrup, perfect for impressing guests at any meal.

ingredients.name: 1 whole organic chicken breast
ingredients.notes: Bone-in for added flavor and nutrition

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Rinse chicken, pat dry, then season inside with salt and pepper.
In a small saucepan, combine coconut sugar, water, and ginger. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Simmer for about 5 minutes or until thickened into a syrup.

Place the seasoned chicken in a roasting pan. Pour syrup over chicken evenly. Place in oven and cook for approximately 20-30 minutes per pound, until fully cooked (internal temperature reaches 165°F).
Reduce heat to low and let chicken rest in the sauce for about 10 minutes before serving.
